vocab.meaning: tràn ngập, bao phủ (cảm giác do âm thanh mang lại)
vocab.example: I love the sound of the ocean waves; I just sit on the sand and let the rhythmic noise wash over me.

vocab.meaning: cảm thấy hòa hợp, thích thú với (nhịp điệu/âm hưởng)
vocab.example: There’s a certain frequency in lo-fi hip hop that I really vibe with when I’m trying to focus on my studies.

vocab.meaning: tận hưởng, đắm mình trong (không gian âm thanh)
vocab.example: On Sunday mornings, I head to the park just to soak up the tranquil sounds of nature and distant laughter.
The crackling of a vinyl record always brings back fond memories of my grandfather’s old living room.

vocab.meaning: làm cho sôi động, vui vẻ hơn
vocab.example: I find that the upbeat sound of a saxophone can really liven up a dull and gloomy afternoon.

vocab.meaning: ngó lơ, không chú ý đến (nhờ một âm thanh khác)
vocab.example: I use the sound of falling rain to tune out the chaotic noise of the city traffic outside my apartment.

vocab.meaning: nghe thấy, bắt được (âm thanh nhỏ hoặc từ xa)
vocab.example: I enjoy the stillness of the night when you can pick up the faint whistling of the wind through the trees.

vocab.meaning: làm cho tâm trạng phấn chấn, vui vẻ hơn
vocab.example: The sound of my favorite acoustic guitar riff never fails to cheer me up when I’m feeling a bit blue.

vocab.meaning: chặn đứng, ngăn không cho nghe thấy
vocab.example: White noise is essential for me to block out the distracting chatter of people in a busy coffee shop.
Listening to the gentle bubbling of a stream is the perfect way for me to chill out after a long week of work.
